chemo.name: Azacitidine (Oral)
notes: Must be taken on an empty stomach
Swallow tablet whole — do not crush or split
Observe for cytopenias; may require dose modification
Continue until disease progression or unacceptable toxicity

nursingNotes: Indication: AML maintenance post-remission (post-induction or post-transplant in some centers)
Monitor CBC every cycle to assess for cytopenias
Assess patient adherence — oral regimen requires good compliance
Manage nausea proactively (oral antiemetics as needed)
Educate patient to report bleeding, bruising, or fatigue
